context: Tests whether PDFKit remains focused on PDF documents while routing broader SwiftUI interop and drawing/markup concerns to sibling skills.

checklist.name: PDF Display Scope
checklist.description: Keeps PDFView, PDFDocument loading/saving, page navigation, search, text extraction, annotations, widget form fields, and thumbnails in PDFKit scope.

checklist.name: PDF-Specific SwiftUI Wrapper
checklist.description: Allows a PDF-specific UIViewRepresentable wrapper for PDFView to remain in PDFKit scope.

checklist.name: Interop Routing
checklist.description: Routes broad UIViewRepresentable architecture, coordinator lifecycle, sizing, and general UIKit-to-SwiftUI migration issues to swiftui-uikit-interop.

checklist.name: PencilKit Routing
checklist.description: Routes Apple Pencil canvas behavior, tool picker setup, stroke serialization, and drawing policies to PencilKit.

checklist.name: PaperKit Routing
checklist.description: Routes system-standard markup UI or structured markup editing to PaperKit when that is the product requirement.

checklist.name: PDF Overlay Handoff
checklist.description: Explains that PDFKit owns per-page overlay placement and PDF persistence handoff when drawing or markup appears over PDF pages.

checklist.name: No Drawing Overclaim
checklist.description: Does not claim PDFKit provides the full PencilKit drawing model or PaperKit markup editor.

checklist.name: Clear Sequence
checklist.description: Provides a clear implementation handoff sequence across PDFKit, SwiftUI interop, PencilKit, and PaperKit.
